# The Boring Diet

> A premium 36-page digital publication containing a bounded 14-day eating experiment.
> One-time purchase. $19 USD. No subscription. Instant digital delivery through Polar.

Note: llms.txt is an optional machine-readable reference and does not replace crawlable HTML, internal linking, structured data or standard SEO.

## Facts

- Brand: The Boring Diet
- Product: The Boring Diet Digital Edition
- Format: PDF
- Length: 36 pages
- Price: $19 USD
- Billing: One-time
- Subscription: None
- Duration: 14 days
- Delivery: Polar digital access
- Account required: No
- Target audience: Adults 18+ considering a short, structured personal experiment
- Medical advice: No
- Exit plan: Included
- Safety boundaries: Included
- Exact protocol public: No (the exact foods, quantities and daily schedule are inside the paid guide)

## What the product is not

- Not a subscription
- Not an app
- Not a medical treatment
- Not personalized dietary advice
- Not a guarantee of weight loss or any specific outcome
